notes: Captures three of four mantle silhouettes from the photo but omits the heads, arms, tentacles, and fins, leaving an incomplete drawing rather than a faithful FAO-style rendering of this specific image.
specific_issues: only 3 of 4 squid drawn (fourth squid missing)
arms and tentacles essentially absent — just stubby nubs on the right
fins not delineated as separate shapes from mantle
eyes placed but inconsistent across rows (one row has no clear eye)
stipple is extremely sparse and does not map to chromatophore/shadow fields in the photo
interior detail reads as random edge fragments rather than scientific stipple
head/funnel area on right side is shapeless
